data.title: Strider 12” Sport Bike - No Pedal Balance Bicycle for Kids 1 to 4 Years - Includes Safety Pad, Padded Seat, Mini Grips & Flat

features: Balance bikes are proven to teach kids to learn to ride faster than training wheels.
With a seat height range from 11-17 in. (28-43 cm)
the Strider 12" Sport fits children with an inseam of 12-18 in. (31-46 cm).
12" foam rubber tires will ensure safe and steady riding over any terrain
The 12" Sport has a lightweight steel frame that weighs in at 6.7 lbs. (3.0 kg). Easy
no stress assembly with all tools included.
The seat and handlebar heights adjust to accommodate ages 1 to 4 years. Maximum Rider Weight: 60 lbs. (27 kg).
